hero.titleLine1: Manage all your business services — in one place
hero.body: Handle accounting, audit, legal, and compliance through one structured platform — powered by a global network of professional firms.
hero.body2: Everything is managed for you — with full visibility and control.
hero.footnote: From onboarding to ongoing compliance, everything runs through one workspace.
hero.trustStrip: A structured client workspace — powered by a curated global network of verified professional firms.

heroLeft.title: What Vacei Is
heroLeft.body: VACEI is a modern accounting, audit and corporate services firm built around one structured digital platform. We handle accounting, compliance, corporate and audit work end to end, using our own technology to deliver clarity, speed and visibility. VACEI is not DIY software and not a marketplace. We are a professional firm that does the work for you, supported by a secure client portal.
heroLeft.footerBody: Every client is supported by a named VACEI team.

auditPlatform.body: Structured workflows, centralised documentation, and complete oversight — so you always know where things stand.
auditPlatform.quoteLine1: Professional services, coordinated for you — without the noise.

principles.title: Structured workflows

workspaceEntry.sectionBody:
Managing accounting, audit, legal, and compliance shouldn’t be fragmented.

VACEI brings everything into one structured platform — where your services, documents, and deadlines are managed in one place.

No emails. No scattered files. No uncertainty.
workspaceEntry.card1Body:
Create a workspace for your business and manage everything in one place.

Your services, documents, and advisors are structured through one platform — giving you full control without complexity.
workspaceEntry.card1CoordinationNote: All services are coordinated through VACEI and delivered through a network of trusted firms.
workspaceEntry.card2Body: Set up your company and centralise incorporation, approvals, compliance, and ongoing support in the same workspace you will use to run the business.

inviteAdvisors.body: Already working with an accountant, auditor, lawyer, or corporate service provider? Bring them into your VACEI workspace and manage requests, documents, approvals, and deadlines in one structured environment.
bullets: Track deadlines and services in one place
Create a clearer and more professional workflow for everyone involved
inviteAdvisors.gifAlt: Invite advisor, advisor joins, shared workspace

processSteps.columnBody: To receive an instant quote or proposals through VACEI, you first create your workspace. This allows your requests, documents, and advisor communication to stay structured from the beginning.

servicesSection.subtitle: Accounting, audit, legal, compliance, and corporate services — structured in one place.
servicesSection.defaultSubtitle: Structured support delivered through one digital platform.

serviceSubtitles.tax-compliance: Filings, deadlines, and ongoing compliance support.
serviceSubtitles.corporate-csp-services: Governance, statutory maintenance, and corporate administration.
serviceSubtitles.regulated-licensing: Licence applications, renewals, and regulatory filings.
serviceSubtitles.advisory-growth: Contracts, transactions, and corporate legal support.
serviceSubtitles.vat-services: VAT registration, returns, and indirect tax.

marketplace.body: Send out a Request for Proposal (RFP) to top-tier firms. Choose between local, regional, and global providers. The VACEI Marketplace gives you direct access to a network of verified professional firms.

steps.title: Request Service
steps.desc: Select the service your business needs and provide preliminary details through your secure workspace.

steps.title: VACEI Coordination
steps.desc: We notify verified partner firms and coordinate the proposal process to ensure quality and speed.

steps.title: Structured Proposals
steps.desc: Receive standardized proposals through your workspace, making them easy to compare and evaluate.

steps.title: Choose & Engage
steps.desc: Compare options, choose the advisor that best fits your needs, and start the engagement immediately.

whyVacei.subtitle: VACEI is built for the modern business. Whether you're a startup or an established group, our platform provides the structure you need to grow.
whyVacei.card1Body: All your companies, services, documents, and advisors in one place. No more searching through emails or fragmented spreadsheets.
whyVacei.card2Body: We only work with pre-vetted firms that meet our high standards for delivery, communication, and technical expertise.

trust.subtitle: From onboarding to ongoing compliance, everything runs through one workspace. Join the future of professional services management.
trust.largeCardBody: VACEI provides a resilient digital environment for unified coordination, ensuring your business stays operational and compliant across every territory.
trust.uptimeBody: Our platform operates at 99.99% availability, ensuring your workspace is always ready when you need it.

features.title: Bank-Grade Encryption
features.desc: All documents and communications are protected with end-to-end AES-256 encryption within a secure digital vault.

features.title: 24/7 Enterprise Support
features.desc: Our dedicated support team is available around the clock to assist with platform navigation and coordination.

companySetup.subtitle: Whether you're setting up in the UAE or globally, VACEI provides the structure you need to launch and grow.

complianceDashboard.body: Track deadlines, filings, and compliance across your business — all from one dashboard.
complianceDashboard.footerNote: No spreadsheets. No manual tracking. No surprises.

multiCompany.body: Managing one company is hard. Managing ten shouldn't be. VACEI is built for founders and groups managing multiple entities.

activeEU.body: VACEI provides the digital environment for international businesses and founders to incorporate, manage, and scale their European operations with confidence.

footerCta.body: Join businesses managing their accounting, audit, legal, and compliance through one structured platform — powered by a global network of firms.

vaceiNetwork.body:
Behind every service is a curated global network of verified professional firms.

VACEI coordinates delivery through this network — ensuring you receive the right expertise without managing multiple providers.

platformPower.body: VACEI provides the structure and visibility needed to coordinate with multiple professional firms, manage compliance, and scale your operations from one secure platform.
highlights: Full visibility across every business engagement
Secure document management and historical tracking
Real-time monitoring of filings and deadlines

features.title: Bookkeeping that powers everything else
features.description: Your bookkeeping runs continuously in the background. You upload documents – our team posts, reconciles, and reviews everything. Once bookkeeping is complete, VAT, tax, audit and reporting can proceed smoothly.

features.title: VAT & payroll filings, period by period
features.description: VAT and payroll run on fixed periods. Each submission is tracked, prepared, submitted, and archived automatically. If nothing changes, you simply confirm – and we take care of the rest.

features.title: Corporate & CSP services with expiry tracking
features.description: Corporate services don't run monthly – they expire. Directorships, registered office, and company secretary services are monitored by expiry date. Renewals are triggered automatically – with reminders and billing.

insightsResources.subtitle: Explore short videos, guides, and articles on accounting, audit, compliance, and business operations — designed to help businesses stay organised, informed, and ready to scale.

resources.title: How to prepare your business for a seamless audit
resources.desc: Discover the exact documents, workflows, and timelines required to navigate the audit process without friction.

resources.title: 3-minute guide to European corporate compliance
resources.desc: Watch a quick breakdown of exactly what documents and deadlines you need to manage when operating in the EU.

resources.title: The ultimate checklist for scaling your operations
resources.desc: Use this comprehensive checklist to ensure your legal, accounting, and operational infrastructure is ready to scale.
